runTitle: Vercel Playwright QA - AI Retention Parity Validation (Chrome Channel)

usageChecks.summary: Chrome channel cross-validation used a single low-volume Playwright pass only (sidebar + fullscreen). Separate Vercel usage dashboard verification remains required if this run is used as a release-facing gate.

notes: Covered surfaces: guest dashboard entry, AI sidebar retention, fullscreen AI workspace retention.
Validated Reporter and Analyst state persistence across chat switching in both sidebar and fullscreen contexts on the chrome launch channel.
Skipped surfaces: general auth UI pack, observability/security pack, analyst/reporter non-retention workflows.
